caveat: Counts are from retained GBIF-sidecar event rows; they support readiness diagnostics only.
Controls have comparable metadata search exposure but no curated event source groups; this leaves targeted-source artifact risk.
OpenAlex reticulation-query counts are broad metadata proxies and not evidence rows.
Existing controls cover 12 case families; family size is measured within the local panel, not global taxonomy.
WFO projection was intentionally not attempted for controls because WFO-only case evidence already collapsed to 2 taxa.
Only 2 low-publication control(s) are available from the local panel; this is not enough to interpret sparse-control non-recovery.
